title: Auto-precache TTS for commented games on load

source.notes: User request: when loading a commented game with a premium TTS provider, precache all speech so narration is instant. The function precacheGame() already exists in tts.ts but is never called.

description: When a user opens a commented game with ElevenLabs/Google TTS configured, the app should immediately start precaching all narration in the background so playback is instant when the user reaches each move. The precacheGame() function at tts.ts:1427 already walks the tree and caches all annotations — it just needs to be wired up. Tie it to the showComments toggle: comments visible = precache, comments hidden = don't precache.
notes: precacheGame() already exists at tts.ts:1427 — walks full tree, generates speech, caches blob URLs
It already skips cloud/system providers and handles all premium providers
It already skips entries already in audioCache
It serializes requests (one at a time) and breaks on error (rate limit safety)
Need to call it: (1) when a tab loads a game with comments, (2) when showComments is toggled on
Don't call it: when showComments is off, when provider is cloud/system, when no API key
Should run in background (fire-and-forget) — don't block the UI
Consider: ElevenLabs rate limits — precacheGame already stops on error, which is correct
Consider: large games with 100+ comments — precache serializes, so it'll take time but won't overwhelm the API

in_scope: Call precacheGame() when a game tab loads with comments and a premium TTS provider
Call precacheGame() when showComments is toggled ON (and auto-narrate or TTS is active)
Fire-and-forget — don't block UI, log result to console
Respect the existing early-returns in precacheGame (no API key, cloud provider, etc.)
out_of_scope: Adding a progress indicator for precaching (future enhancement)
Precaching for the cloud provider (clips are on CDN already)
Precaching system TTS (no API, speaks directly)

requirements: Precaching fires when loading a commented game with ElevenLabs/Google configured
Precaching does NOT fire when showComments is off
Precaching does NOT fire for cloud or system providers
Cached audio plays instantly when the user reaches the move
Precaching stops gracefully on rate limit or API error
edge_cases: Switching tabs mid-precache — should not crash or leak
Toggling showComments off then on rapidly — should not double-precache
Game with no comments — precacheGame returns 0 immediately, no harm
Invalid API key — precacheGame errors on first call and stops

requirements: Precaching must not block the UI thread (fire-and-forget async)
Precaching must not cause visible lag on game load

acceptance_gates: Opening a commented game with ElevenLabs triggers background precaching
Console shows 'TTS precached N/M annotations' after loading
Navigating to precached moves plays audio instantly (no network delay)

manual: Open with-comments.pgn as a local database game with ElevenLabs configured
Observe console: should see 'TTS precaching N annotations...' then 'TTS precached N/M annotations'
Navigate through the game — commented moves should narrate instantly with no delay
Toggle 'hide comments' — precaching should not fire
Toggle 'show comments' back on — precaching should fire again for any uncached entries
Switch to cloud provider — precaching should not fire

done_criteria: precacheGame() called on game load for premium providers when comments visible
precacheGame() called when showComments toggled on
Manual testing confirms instant narration after precache
